Hey everyone, this is Russell. Welcome back to the TenX Seekers Trading Class. I am so excited to bring you this interview today. This interview is with somebody who as I was developing this, the perfect webinar, developing the stuff the very first time, was going through it and learning it kind of in real time with me. Initially, if someone was listening to the podcast and was having brain dump ideas, she was taking them and implementing them. Later she became a client and a student and I've watched as their company went from an idea to, and I'm not at liberty to share their sales, but multiple millions of dollars a month and it's all been through this framework, this process you guys are learning right now. They've used this to sell their information products. They've used this to sell supplements. They use this to sell event tickets. They use this to sell coaching. They've used this to sell everything they sell. They use this exact same framework you guys are learning inside this business. And I want to share the interview with, her interview with you for a couple of reasons. One is because a lot of people are like, oh, this isn't gonna work for my business. But literally, you're gonna see how she's used this exact same framework to sell every type of thing you can dream of. It's not just information products. It's info products, supplements, events, coaching, tickets like swag, everything they do, they use the same framework and that's amazing. So the person I'm gonna introduce you today is Kailin Polin. She is the founder of a company called Lady Boss Weight Loss. It's one of you guys who've been in our community, know her story and have seen a little bit behind the scenes, but she doesn't come on and kind of talk about it. Now a couple of things I really, to kind of set up before you guys jump into the interview, she covers a ton of really cool things, but the first thing I wanna talk about is when I first started teaching this concept of the perfect webinar, I told people, I said, okay, this is the deal. And I remember it was the New Year's, I was on a podcast and I said, if you guys wanna make at least a million dollars in the next 12 months, this is the business model, okay? Like you don't need business plans and whiteboards, all that stuff, like this is the model. Do a webinar once a week, live, every single week for an entire year, by the time you're done, all your money problems will disappear forever. And I've said that and I post this podcast and I don't know, probably 40, 50,000 people listen to that podcast episode. And I don't know, maybe a handful people have actually done it. And Kaylin was one of them, she said, okay, Russell said do a live webinar, I'm gonna do a live webinar every single Thursday. And so she did, and she did a live webinar every single Thursday for, and she talks about the interview, I think 40 weeks in a row she did this thing, right? And what's cool about it is that every time you do the webinar, you hear different things, right? You do the presentation and you kind of, partially you'll feel like what works when it didn't work and then you'll get the idea, you look at the questions and the answers people submit, and you're like, oh man, people are getting confused here, they're stuck here, let me take those things and we'll rewrite the presentation, make some tweaks and changes. And you get every single week for a year, by the time it's done, your presentation's so perfect that it's almost impossible people not to buy when they come on, okay? You've been through my presentations, why was I able to stand on Grant Cardone's event and do three and a half million dollars in sales in 90 minutes? Because I've done that presentation like a hundred times live. I know every concern is before it comes up, I know what you're thinking, as you're thinking, I know how to resolve those concerns because I've seen webinar after webinar after webinar, every single time at this minute point, here's all the questions that are coming in. So I know that's the questions that are coming in, so I've tweaked my presentation to get rid of those questions before they ever come, right? And so the first thing we'll talk about is just the power of doing the webinar live, okay? Everyone wants to be lazy, they're like, oh, I'm gonna do this, I'm gonna do it live once, I'm gonna automate it, I'm gonna record it and then I'll put it in an automated, I'm not gonna do it live, it's like, oh, you are losing so much by doing it live. I still remember the very first time I did the Funnel Hacks presentation, the very first time, the presentation you saw at Grant's event. The very first time I did it, I was at an event and it did well and I remember the next day I was heading out to the airport and I met some lady in the hall and she was like, hey Russell, Russell, your presentation was awesome. Unfortunately, we couldn't buy it, I'm like, oh, you can afford it or what? She's like, no, I'm a coach and I don't sell supplements, you're talking about supplement funnels work and I wish I sold supplements because your thing sounded awesome. And I was like, wait, what? I'm like, you can use funnels for coaching businesses too. She's like, what, really? I'm like, yeah, I have a coaching business, like I literally filled it up with funnels. She's like, are you kidding me? She's like, my friends would be so excited that she ran and she got three of her friends, they ran in, they grabbed the order forms, they filled them, ran back out to me as I'm heading to the plane, like, here you go, thank you so much, I had no idea this would actually work for my business. And I'm like, oh my gosh, like, and that feedback was huge for me, so I'm in the plane flying home, I went through and I changed my slides, like, and if you watch the presentation, you notice the whole section, I'm like, this will work for this business and this business and this business, and I'm like, I show it works for all these other businesses, right? Then I landed in Boise and I had a webinar lined up. I remember that morning, I think we had, I think about 500 or so people to register for this webinar. Jump on the webinar, I did the presentation and we sold like $30,000 in sales and it did good, I was like excited. And then I had another webinar happening four hours later, but what I did is that when the webinar was done, that first one, in the webinar software, I used to export all the questions that people were asking, export all the questions, I started reading through them, I'm like, oh my gosh, everyone's confused about this, they're confused about this. So during that four hour gap I went through and I started like changing my slides, adding things, editing things and tweaking stuff up, four hours later I did a webinar to a smaller audience or less people there, did the presentation and we did over $100,000 in sales, okay? What was the difference? What was the difference was I was taking the feedback, changing it, taking the feedback, changing it and then over and over and over and over again. I did my webinar live over 50 times before I ever automated it, okay? Now most of you guys won't do that, okay? I know that, you're not gonna do that, but I promise you if you do do that, your presentation will be better, you'll make more money, like, it's just, anyway, if you trust me, do it. Plan a live webinar week for the next year and if you do that by the time you're done, you'll be amazing at the presentation. So that's number one. Number two, we talk about this in the interview, a little while later is when we kind of pioneered this concept that we now call the perfect webinar hack or the Facebook live version of the webinar. And so I did one, again, this is after me doing hundreds of webinars live on a webinar. I decided to go live on Facebook and just click go on Facebook live and do my webinar live, but because I'd done so many times, I knew the concerns, I knew the stories, I knew the process and so I was able to do it and I'll tell you the story in the interview, I killed it and we killed it with the Facebook live webinar. And then Kaylin saw me do it and two days later, she did the Facebook live webinar, she crushed it. A lot of people have seen her Facebook live webinar that I think they did a million dollars first 30 days with it and they've since used this as a tool to completely dramatically scale the company. And people are like, oh, I'm gonna do a Facebook live webinar. They jump on the very first time to do a Facebook live and they completely bomb and they're like, why did I bomb? And it's like, the reason why Facebook live webinar works is because Kaylin did it live 30 or 40 times before she ever did that. Russell did it live 30 or 40 times before he ever did it. Like, you have to master your pitch here before you ever do it here, okay? You think about like a great comedian doesn't just go one day on Jay Leno or, you know, tonight's show or whatever, he gives a microphone and they like stand up on stage and like perfect, you know, give this amazing act that everyone dies laughing, right? How does the comedian do it, right? The comedian will go and they'll go live, right? They'll go to a bar, like a dive bar and they'll write 10 jokes and they'll tell these 10 jokes. Another 10, maybe two of them land and the other eight just bombed. Now, if they were doing that live on Facebook, they would have been like the worst act ever, right? But they said, okay, these two jokes were awesome. The other eight weren't good. So they throw away the other eight jokes. They write eight new ones. Now they have 10 new jokes. They go to the next Facebook live. They do it, boom. And this time three of the jokes land and the other seven bomb, right? And they do that over and they go from dive bar to dive bar to dive bar. For us, it's like live webinar to live webinar to live webinar and eventually you end up, well, you have 10 stories, 10 jokes, 10 things you know, just nail every single time and then you go on the big stage, right? That's when you get invited to Jimmy Kimmel and you pick up the mic and you just slay it. You just crush it for everybody, right? But all this one, just come up here at the big stage and just kill it. It's like, no, you have to do your work. Okay, great comedians do the work, great presenters do their work. So doing a live, on a live webinar is how you do your work, how you cut your teeth, how you get your presentation perfect. And after you have that, then this becomes a tool that's just huge for you, okay? So she talks about that. Inside there she talks about a whole bunch of other things. Yeah, so basically long story short is we were just broke. You're coming out of a network marketing company where like we don't wanna do this anymore. Like let's do something else. And someone actually showed us ClickFunnels that used to do like Google AdWords and stuff like that. And they showed us ClickFunnels and we're like, oh, it's like the coolest thing ever. And then you started like chasing us around the internet. And that's when we saw like one of your ads and you know, we finally got signed up. And when we opened up like everything that you're talking about now and opened up the program, we like started going through like little by little, like my husband will make a stop, Brandon will make a stop because he's like the smart one, right? He's like the genius. And then I'm like the wild crazy one on the front with like the content, right? So you have Brandon who's like, no, we have to stop it. Like every minute, every time he tells us to do something, we have to stop it and actually do it. And we just started doing that. We started building momentum and creating because we didn't have a product, we didn't have anything. So we literally went through the whole process of product creation, webinar creation, like email sequences, like just every tiny little thing because we knew absolutely nothing. Like absolutely nothing about internet marketing. All we knew was that we wanted to help people, we wanted to help women, we wanted to help people and we wanted to do it online. So we could actually like scale ourselves because before it was very like time-based for us. It was like trading time for money and we couldn't scale our businesses without us like working more hours of the day. And so we kind of reverse engineered what we wanted and just went through all of the products like literally step by step and stopped every like minute, every three minutes. And if you were like telling us something that was gonna take like two days to do it, like we weren't allowed to come back and watch anymore until we went through those two days of writing like entire like email sequences. And then we could finally come back and watch the video. And so that's kind of like how this whole thing got started and literally just executing on every little tiny thing, like as it was told to us instead of like waiting until we went through the whole train and then coming back and being like, okay, so where should we start now? Right? Which like I totally would have done, but you know, Brandon was like, no, like we have to do it right now. So that's kind of how it all got rolling. It's so awesome. Yeah, exactly. Okay. So with you, like one of the things I love about your story is just how like anytime I said anything, you guys would just do it to a T. I did a podcast, I was driving home and I was like, okay guys, this is the plan. You can't do anything, you just go live. And I told everybody that. And I think you were the only person who like said, okay, and you did it. Cause how many, I'm curious how many times in that next year did you do a live webinar, live live, not fake live. You told, you told Brandon and I that we weren't allowed to do another offer. I think it was like when we like approached you at phone hacking live or something and Brandon was like, so what should we do? Should we like do supplements next? Should we do this? I'm like, we didn't even know you then. And you were like, until you make like a million dollars with that offer and like you've done a webinar every single week, like do not sell anything else. And we were just like, okay. And then we went and did a webinar every single Thursday, seven mountain time, nine Eastern time, every single Thursday. I think of that year we did like, I don't know, like 40 webinars or something like 38 webinars, 40 webinars like of that year, like starting in like March when I know hacking live was and we literally did one every single week, every single week, every single week. And I was almost like, oh my gosh, I have to do this again. Like the same thing. But honestly, like it just, I know like people are like, why do I have to do it every single week? If I like sold on the first one, but it teaches you who your customers are so much. Because as you change, like what we found is like, as ads change on the front end, as like your warm people like go away and you're getting more cold people on your webinar, like it's completely different customer, right? And so it just dials in, you know, people think it's like overnight success with us, but we've just dialed in with our customers so much because we're willing to like do it so many times. We're willing to do the webinar so many times that at the end of every webinar, we would literally print out every single comment, every comment, and we would go through it and we would see every objection. And webinar to webinar changes, right? So we're running ads to these different demographics that are getting people on our webinar. Their questions are different than last week's. And so we just made like a giant, like we just compiled, compiled, compiled, compiled. And that's what just crafted my message so well on the front was because we had all these different people coming from different places. And we recognize that instead of thinking like, oh, everyone that gets on is just the same, like is the same person. And so from week to week, it taught us like really all the dimensions, like all the spokes of our customer, like we know like to a T, to every exact question that that person and that demographic is gonna ask. And then we are able to, like I'm able to overcome those objections because I know like so in such great detail who each of those people are. So I think that's like the greatest thing about doing it live every week is cause it's always different people. It's not the same. It's the same pitch with a couple of things changed at the end that you learned from last week, but it's not the same people, which like, you know, just helps you dial in, like you're able to sell to them better, which is important. So cool. It's funny cause I saw many people who, like you said, they will, even someone will even do it live once. They just like sitting in the room, they record it once and then like, okay, it's live. I don't wanna do live. Cause I don't want to be forced to do it live every single week. And I'm like, it makes me feel like in any other business, like everyone, like if you have a job, you do the same thing all the time, right? Some reason they all don't wanna do a webinar live every week. It's like, that's the most valuable thing you could possibly be doing. Cause first off, it generates money. Second off, you learn how to speak. You find your voice, you learn your, like the objections, all the stuff you said, and very few people ever do it. And I'm so proud that you did. I did want a cryo son. I knew my wife would say no if I asked her. And so, but I was like, if I want it, she couldn't say no, like she'd have to let me get it. Cause I, that's true. Doesn't just like also get on Jimmy Fallon, get the microphone and tell us thing and like land these jokes, right? It's like he's in the dive bar and he does it like once and then tries it and then, you know, he does 10 jokes, like two jokes, lamp their eight bomb, there's another dive bar and you write new jokes and it gets three of the land. And eventually it gets the whole thing perfect. Then he goes live. Yeah. A lot of people have seen what you do. They try to go live on Facebook. It's like they don't have the foundation and it's like, oh, it doesn't work. Exactly because like the reason I was able to do it in 30 minutes, right? But it's like, I've delivered the webinar so many times. It's literally memorized. I could say it in my sleep. Like you're like, kill it, do your webinar right now. I'll be able to like do my webinar.
